section_miscategorizations.text: Her blood sugars have been stable, and her hemoglobin A1c was recently 6.8%.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Recent objective lab value and glycemic control status function more as clinical data/findings than as patient-reported symptom history.

section_miscategorizations.text: She is due for an ophthalmology checkup in the coming weeks.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a forward-looking care need/anticipated referral rather than part of the current symptom history.
